name: Sun | siren | TSAMS |
description: This mer was the loveliest shade of gold and yellow with splashes of white much like a koi fish and light orange fins that fit him perfectly. His eyes were a pale blue like the sky when the sun was high. His head was even encircled with light orange fins as well that made him look like an angel. He had the sweetest voice anyone has ever heard.
creator: BloodSUN
